mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_conversation_deletion (conversation_id, status, requested_at, updated_at, completed_at, retry_count, last_error) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{status}, #{requestedAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{retryCount}, #{lastError}) ON CONFLICT(conversation_id) DO UPDATE SET status = excluded.status, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, completed_at = excluded.completed_at, retry_count = excluded.retry_count, last_error = excluded.last_error
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_conversation_deletion WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_conversation_deletion WHERE status IN ('REQUESTED', 'WAITING_FOR_RUNS', 'PURGING') ORDER BY requested_at ASC LIMIT 10
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_conversation_deletion SET locked_by = #{lockedBy}, lock_expires_at = #{lockExpiresAt}, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND (locked_by IS NULL OR lock_expires_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now'))

UPDATE agent_conversation_deletion SET status = #{status}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}

UPDATE agent_conversation_deletion SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now'), updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now'), locked_by = NULL, lock_expires_at = NULL WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}

UPDATE agent_conversation_deletion SET status = 'REQUESTED', retry_count = 0, last_error = NULL, locked_by = NULL, lock_expires_at = NULL, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
UPDATE agent_conversation_deletion SET locked_by = NULL, lock_expires_at = NULL, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_conversation_deletion WHERE status IN ('REQUESTED', 'WAITING_FOR_RUNS', 'PURGING') AND (locked_by IS NULL OR lock_expires_at <= #{staleThreshold})
